CREATE TABLE sales (id INT, amount FLOAT);
INSERT INTO sales VALUES (1, 100.50), (2, NULL), (3, 200.75);
SELECT sum(amount) FROM sales;
CREATE TABLE products (id INT, price FLOAT, category_id INT);
INSERT INTO products VALUES (1, 25.5, 1), (2, 35.5, 1), (3, 45.0, 2);
SELECT sum(price) FROM products WHERE category_id = 1;
SELECT sum(cast(amount as real)) FROM sales WHERE id IN (SELECT ID FROM sales WHERE amount > 100);
CREATE TABLE category (id INT, name VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO category VALUES (1, 'Electronics'), (2, 'Furniture');
SELECT sum(p.price) FROM products p INNER JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE c.name = 'Electronics';
CREATE TABLE temp_sales (id INT, amount FLOAT);
INSERT INTO temp_sales VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 150.0), (3, NULL);
SELECT sum(coalesce(amount, 0)) FROM temp_sales;
SELECT sum(s.amount) FROM (SELECT amount FROM sales WHERE amount IS NOT NULL) s;
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT, total_amount FLOAT);
INSERT INTO orders VALUES (1, 100.0), (2, 150.5), (3, NULL);
SELECT sum(o.total_amount) FROM orders o WHERE order_id IN (SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE total_amount IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE transactions (trans_id INT, value FLOAT, user_id INT);
INSERT INTO transactions VALUES (1, 10.0, 1), (2, 20.0, 2), (3, NULL);
SELECT sum(t.value) FROM transactions t WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM transactions WHERE trans_id = 1);
SELECT sum(cast(coalesce(t.value, 0) as double)) FROM transactions t;
